name: The Hallowed Azamina
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>薊花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アザミナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Reveal 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck, and for every 4 Levels it has (round down), send 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your hand and/or field to the GY (if face-down, reveal it), then Special Summon that revealed monster. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) If this card is in the GY: You can target 1 "Azamina" monster you control or in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "The Hallowed Azamina" once per turn.
eff: Reveal 1 "Azamina" Fusion Monster in your Extra Deck, and for every 4 Levels it has (round down), send 1 "Sinful Spoils" card from your hand and/or field to the GY (if face-down, reveal it), then Special Summon that revealed monster. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) If this card is in the GY: You can target 1 "Azamina" monster you control or in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "The Hallowed Azamina" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Fusion Summon
